system_description.retriever: BM25 (simplified single-doc-corpus implementation, seed corpus: 5 policy documents)
system_description.llm_role: Draft memo and adverse action text from retrieved policy; ASSISTIVE_ONLY
hard_rules: LLM never approves or rejects applicant
All outputs tagged ASSISTIVE_ONLY + HUMAN_REVIEW_REQUIRED + NOT_FINAL_DECISION
No live applicant data sent to external API — demo uses anonymised summaries
Adverse action draft is NOT legally compliant without credit officer review and sign-off

policy_corpus.title: Credit Decisioning Policy — Score Band Assignment
Model Monitoring and Drift Alert Policy
LLM Governance Assistant — Scope and Limitations

cases.query: applicant score green band automatic approval eligibility
cases.applicant_summary: Applicant A — PD=0.034, strong external bureau score, 12yr employment, no payment arrears.

retrieved_docs.title: Credit Decisioning Policy — Score Band Assignment
Model Monitoring and Drift Alert Policy

llm_output.draft_memo:
[ASSISTIVE DRAFT — HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED]
Applicant summary: Applicant A — PD=0.034, strong external bureau score, 12yr employment, no payment arrears.
Model score (PD): 0.0335 — GREEN band (PD<0.20).
Per POL-001: eligible for automatic approval subject to hard-stop verification.
Recommended action: Proceed to hard-stop check and approve if no flags.
[NOT_FINAL_DECISION — Credit officer must confirm.]

cases.hard_rule: LLM must never approve or reject applicant. Credit officer makes final decision.

cases.query: monthly PSI score distribution drift monitoring escalation model risk committee
cases.applicant_summary: Monthly monitoring report — score PSI=0.31 detected on 2026-07-01.

retrieved_docs.title: Model Monitoring and Drift Alert Policy

llm_output.draft_memo:
[DRIFT ALERT — HUMAN REVIEW REQUIRED]
Monthly PSI monitoring detected: score PSI = 0.31 (above threshold 0.25).
Per POL-003: mandatory escalation to Model Risk Committee within 5 business days.
Action: Suspend automated scoring pending model review.
[ASSISTIVE_ONLY — Model Risk Officer must initiate formal review.]

cases.hard_rule: LLM must never approve or reject applicant. Credit officer makes final decision.

governance_design_notes: 6 cases cover: approve (GREEN), review (AMBER), high-risk (RED), conflict/override, abstain (out-of-domain), drift alert
Abstain fires when no policy document is sufficiently relevant (BM25 < 0.25) — prevents hallucinated policy citations
Conflict case explicitly routed to override protocol doc (POL-004) — credit officer authority preserved
Drift alert case retrieves monitoring policy (POL-003) and surfaces MRC escalation requirement
SHAP features sourced from gold_pass3_shap_reason_code_report.json — reason codes traceable to evidence
